understanding.goal_understanding: Get any pushable object (the selected piece or any pushable block) to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in level.target_x.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: SELECT switches control to a specific piece by ID, repositioning to its location. MOVE directions (UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT) translate the selected piece by grid steps (e.g., 3 units). Pushable blocks are displaced forward when the selected piece moves into their position, if space allows ahead of them. Walls or obstacles block movement, preventing traversal or pushing.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Currently at [-3, 0], move right to [0, 0] to become adjacent to the block 'pb' at [3, 0]. This positions us to push 'pb' right on the next turn, which may chain-push the wall 'wt' at [6, 0] rightward toward or beyond x=9, or allow subsequent pushes to get 'pb' or 'sel' to x>=9. Efficient path to goal without wasting steps left.
